name: VISIT PLAN VS ACTUAL
query:
select
E.employee_name As Engineer,
E.division As Territory,
(case when E.designation = "Manager" then 36 else 60 end)  as "Plan",
(select count(*) from `tabCustomer Visit` CV where CV.employee = E.employee 
and (DATE(CV.date) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s) and CV.company = %(company)s) as "Actual"

From `tabEmployee` E
Where E.designation In ('Manager', 'Engineer','Sales Engineer','Service Engineer') And E.status = 'active' and E.company = %(company)s
Group by E.name
